description: Perform a 3D volumetric analysis of a cell nucleus from the Z-stack microscopy image located at ~/Fiji_Data/raw/fluorescence_stack.dv. Ensure the image is spatially calibrated in microns. Segment the nucleus to measure its volume and surface area, applying a minimum size filter of 1000 to exclude noise. Save the resulting measurements table to ~/Fiji_Data/results/3d_morphometry.csv and the 3D object map to ~/Fiji_Data/results/3d_object_map.tif.
